programs.title: Payback
programs.desc: When a man is shot and killed soon after an alleged domestic assault, authorities suspect the girlfriend, but through their investigation they learn she did indeed seek payback, but it was not intended to be deadly.

programs.title: Sins of the City
programs.sub_title: Sins of the City - Clarksdale, Mississippi
programs.desc: In 2013, mayoral candidate Marco McMillian was hoping to bring seismic change to his hometown of Clarksdale, Mississippi. But before he has his chance, he's found dead under mysterious circumstances, sparking rumors of a political assassination.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: When 34-year-old Julii Johnson is gunned down in front of her boyfriend’s home, police are baffled by the lack of a motive – until they find half a million dollars hidden in her boyfriend’s condo. Was the murder payback by a rival drug dealer? Or did this “It Girl” finally make the wrong woman jealous?

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: It seemed nothing could tear these three best friends apart. But behind closed doors trouble was brewing, and things would boil over in the most horrifying way. Now it’s up to detectives to determine what triggered the bloodshed? And who’s to blame?

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.sub_title: Fatal Attraction - The Blade of a Broken Heart
programs.desc: A young father who was excited to watch his sons grow up is fatally stabbed on Thanksgiving weekend. When detectives uncover a love triangle, they question the motive behind his murder and find a killer determined to have their pie... and eat it too.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.sub_title: For My Man - Ciera Johnson/Krystal Riordan
programs.desc: Ciera Johnson has been living a righteous life in Cleveland. But when her boyfriend questions her loyalty, she goes to extremes to prove her love.Krystal Riordan goes from rags to riches when she is adopted by a loving family. But her fairytale becomes a nightmare when she begins dating a pimp in NYC.
